description_long: This lamppost features a classic Victorian-inspired design with three ornate lantern-style lamp heads arranged symmetrically at the top. Each lamp head is encased in a decorative housing with pointed finials and glass panels, supported by elegantly curved scrollwork arms. The central post is robust and cylindrical, tapering slightly as it rises from a square, tiered base that provides stability and a touch of grandeur. The surface is finished in a matte black, giving it a timeless and sophisticated appearance suitable for upscale urban environments, parks, or historic districts. Decorative elements such as intricate scrollwork and ornamental finials enhance its visual appeal. The overall construction suggests durability and weather resistance, typical of cast iron or steel lampposts found in public spaces.
description: A classic black Victorian-style lamppost with three ornate lantern heads, decorative scrollwork, and a sturdy square base. Its elegant design and matte finish make it ideal for historic or upscale urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three lantern heads symmetrically arranged, with ornate scrollwork and the full square base visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the scrollwork arms and the staggered arrangement of the lamp heads.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all three lantern heads and decorative elements clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the scrollwork and the spatial relationship between the lamp heads.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Victorian lantern style with pointed finials, glass panels, and ornate housings
